properties.note: Real survey data from notes.gpkg (QField), 2026-07-08. School garden polygon is a straightened/scaled rectangle: orientation and anchor corner taken from the first surveyed bed's real edge, squared to true right angles and scaled to the full planned 45x45m plot (the raw survey trapezoid had GPS-noise-driven distortion).

properties.label: Women's Garden — complete, ~0.75 acre, tilled (10 plots to be divided within, not yet staked out)
School Garden — 45 x 45 m (~0.5 acre) planned footprint; 1 of 3 beds (15 x 45 m) built so far
